curl (7.81.0-1ubuntu1.16) jammy-security; urgency=medium

  * SECURITY UPDATE: denial of service via OCSP stapling
    - debian/patches/CVE-2024-7264.patch: check for NULL in
      lib/vtls/openssl.c.
    - CVE-2024-7264
  * SECURITY UPDATE: cookie injection with redirect
    - debian/patches/CVE-2024-8096.patch: fix cookie handling
      in lib/cookie.c.
    - CVE-2024-8096

 -- Marc Deslauriers <marc.deslauriers@ubuntu.com>  Thu, 12 Sep 2024 13:45:02 -0400

curl (7.81.0-1ubuntu1.15) jammy-security; urgency=medium

  * SECURITY UPDATE: information disclosure via netrc
    - debian/patches/CVE-2024-0853.patch: fix netrc handling.
    - CVE-2024-0853

 -- Marc Deslauriers <marc.deslauriers@ubuntu.com>  Mon, 05 Feb 2024 08:12:33 -0500
